recent_news.title: Breathe ESG raises Series A to accelerate carbon accounting platform
recent_news.summary: Breathe ESG secured $5M in Series A funding to expand its SaaS platform helping enterprises measure and reduce scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions.

recent_news.title: Breathe ESG launches AI-powered emission tracking tools
recent_news.summary: New features automate data ingestion from utility bills and logistics reports using multimodal document extraction algorithms.
